name: bring-back-spawner-blocking
title: Bring Back Spawner Blocking
author: BeraIV
description: Reverts the 2.1 spawner changes that broke walling off nests: removes the acid cloud, and tunes spawning_radius/spawning_spacing to 4/3 - two rings of pipes around a spawner is enough to block it reliably, without needing a fully solid fill.
